name: percus-review
description: Percus kit Fase 7 v6.8.1 — fix mock-scan hook: falso-positivo R3 em palavras acentuadas (PT 'metodo' contem 'todo'). Causa: decode OEM do git show mojibakava 'e' acentuado criando word-boundary falsa + match case-insensitive de TODO/FIXME/XXX/HACK. Fix: Get-PercusStagedContent forca UTF-8 + markers viram case-sensitive (?-i:). mock-scan ganha dual stdin path (testavel). Mantém v6.8.0 (Sprint v6.8 canonizacao auth: GET /tenants/by-origin, templates/login-ui, scaffold-percus-project, R7.5+R7.6, lib percus-auth 0.4.0), v6.7.2 (cross-repo R11), v6.7.1 (marketplace sync), v6.7.0 (anti-hallucination), v6.6.x, v6.5.x, v6.4.0, v6.3.0.
